{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Trial One
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The archway marks the beginning of [[Trial One]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c12">''Blackflame'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
